title: Why is Tongue Twister 'Floccinaucinihilipilification' Trending? Here's What It Means & How It Is Related To Sitharaman Defamation Case
description: Why is 29-letter word 'floccinaucinihilipilification' trending? The tongue twister grabbed public attention after Delhi's Rouse Avenue Court used the extremely long word while hearing a defamation case filed against Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman by ex-Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) MLA Somnath Bharti's wife Lipika Mitra. Here is what it means:
